englishDefinitions: a famous Thracian gladiator who led a slave revolt against the Roman Republic
persianTranslation: گلادیاتور و رهبر شورش بردگان در روم باستان
examples: Spartacus became a symbol of resistance against oppression.
The film Spartacus is a classic historical epic.
Many readers know the name Spartacus from Roman history.
